description.ko: 음향 에너지의 역동적인 시각화인 ECHO-0는 디지털 공간에서 상호작용하는 보이지 않는 소리의 물결을 포착합니다.
description.en: A dynamic visualization of acoustic energy, ECHO-0 captures the invisible ripples of sound as they interact with a digital void.

prompt: Abstract sound visualization of ECHO-0, rhythmic concentric waves pulsating from a central core, neon cyan and deep violet gradients, holographic frequency bars, fluid motion blur, high-tech aesthetic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting.
